item.title: I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit 摘要
item.description:
Anthropic is rumored to have its first profitable quarter, while OpenAI and Anthropic have both shifted enterprise pricing to match API token costs, eliminating previous discounts. This change, along with the release of more expensive frontier models (GPT-5.5, Opus 4.7), has led to stories of companies like Uber exceeding AI budgets due to heavy use of coding agents like Claude Code and Codex. The author argues this indicates product-market fit for AI coding agents, which burn many tokens and are used by well-paid professionals. Both labs are hiring heavily for enterprise sales roles. The AI failure stories are overblown; the pricing changes reflect real demand.
标签: AI, Anthropic, OpenAI, pricing, enterprise, coding agents, product-market fit, Claude Code, Codex, LLM

item.title: SQLAlchemy 2 In Practice - Solutions to the Exercises 摘要
item.description:
This article concludes the SQLAlchemy 2 in Practice series by providing solutions to all exercises. The author encourages readers to support their work by purchasing the book from their store or Amazon.
标签: SQLAlchemy, Python, database, tutorial, exercises, book, programming
